---
title: "Books"
description: "Categorized research materials, conference summaries, and technical learning resources."
include-in-header: 
  text: |
    <script src="assets/js/system-init.js"></script>
---


## E-Books

::: {.software-grid}

::: {.resource-card}
### [Practical Deep Learning (Fast.ai)](https://course.fast.ai/){.stretched-link}
Fast.ai's top-tier practical course for applying Deep Learning to real problems.
:::

::: {.resource-card}
### [Automating GIS Processes](https://autogis-site.readthedocs.io/en/latest/){.stretched-link}
Python-based course for automating geospatial analysis with Geopandas.
:::


:::


## Online Courses

::: {.software-grid}


::: {.resource-card}
### [NASA ARSET](https://appliedsciences.nasa.gov/what-we-do/capacity-building/arset){.stretched-link}
Applied Remote SEnsing Training program for learning RS technologies.
:::

::: {.resource-card}
### [The State of Satellites](https://landscape.satsummit.io/){.stretched-link}
A guide to current satellite remote sensing technology and and apply it.
:::

:::


## Workshops

::: {.software-grid}

::: {.resource-card}
### [ML for Remote Sensing (ICLR 2023)](resources/ml-remote-sensing.qmd){.stretched-link}
Detailed breakdown of the Machine Learning for Remote Sensing workshop at ICLR 2023.
:::

:::


## Introduction to Python Programming

::: {.software-grid}

::: {.resource-card}
[![](https://openscapes.org/images/logo/openscapes_hex_badge.png){.resource-img}](https://boettiger-lab.github.io/nasa-topst-env-justice/){.stretched-link}
### [Cloud Native Geospatial in R & Python](https://boettiger-lab.github.io/nasa-topst-env-justice/)
Cloud-native workflows I follow for environmental justice research using R and Python.
:::

::: {.resource-card}
[![](https://e-sensing.github.io/sitsbook/images/cover_sits_book_quarto.png){.resource-img}](https://e-sensing.github.io/sitsbook/){.stretched-link}
### [SITS: Analysis on EO Data Cubes](https://e-sensing.github.io/sitsbook/)
Satellite Image Time Series analysis on Earth Observation data cubes.
:::

::: {.resource-card}
### [Python Programming (Gyansetu)](https://gyansetu-python.gitbook.io/python-programming){.stretched-link}
A comprehensive guide to Python programming I recommend from the Gyansetu project.
:::

::: {.resource-card}
[![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AllenDowney/ThinkPython/v3/think_python_3e.jpg){.resource-img}](https://allendowney.github.io/ThinkPython/){.stretched-link}
### [Think Python](https://allendowney.github.io/ThinkPython/)
The classic introduction to Python programming by Allen B. Downey.
:::

::: {.resource-card}
### [Intro to Stats with Python](https://allendowney.github.io/ThinkStats/){.stretched-link}
Introduction to statistics and probability using Python (Think Stats).
:::

::: {.resource-card}
[![](https://pypod.github.io/assets/images/logo.png){.resource-img}](https://pypod.github.io/){.stretched-link}
### [Programming in Python (IIT)](https://pypod.github.io/)
IIT Madras course materials for programming and data structures in Python.
:::

:::


## Geospatial Python Programming

::: {.software-grid}

::: {.resource-card}
[![](https://spatial-analytics.readthedocs.io/en/latest/_static/Aalto-logo.png){.resource-img}](https://spatial-analytics.readthedocs.io/en/latest/index.html){.stretched-link}
### [Spatial Analytics](https://spatial-analytics.readthedocs.io/en/latest/index.html)
Advanced spatial analytics and geocomputation with Python.
:::

::: {.resource-card}
[![](https://geostatsguy.github.io/GeostatsPyDemos_Book/_static/AppliedGeostats.jpg){.resource-img}](https://geostatsguy.github.io/GeostatsPyDemos_Book/intro.html){.stretched-link}
### [Applied Geostatistics in Python](https://geostatsguy.github.io/GeostatsPyDemos_Book/intro.html)
A hands-on guide to applied geostatistics with Python implementations.
:::

::: {.resource-card}
[![](https://geocompx.org/static/img/book_cover_py.png){.resource-img}](https://py.geocompx.org/){.stretched-link}
### [Python for Geocomputation](https://py.geocompx.org/)
The Python version of the famous Geocomputation with R book.
:::

::: {.resource-card}
[![](https://images.routledge.com/common/jackets/crclarge/978103244/9781032445953.jpg){.resource-img}](https://geographicdata.science/book/intro.html){.stretched-link}
### [Geographic Data Science](https://geographicdata.science/book/intro.html)
A modern approach to data science with geographic information.
:::

::: {.resource-card}
[![](https://pygis.io/_static/pygis.png){.resource-img}](https://pygis.io/docs/a_intro.html#){.stretched-link}
### [PyGIS Docs](https://pygis.io/docs/a_intro.html#)
Comprehensive documentation for Python-based GIS workflows.
:::

::: {.resource-card}
[![](https://autogis-site.readthedocs.io/en/latest/_static/AutoGIS.PNG){.resource-img}](https://autogis-site.readthedocs.io/en/latest/#){.stretched-link}
### [AutoGIS — Automating GIS](https://autogis-site.readthedocs.io/en/latest/#)
One of my favorite resources for automating GIS processes with Python.
:::

::: {.resource-card}
### [<i class="bi bi-mortarboard"></i> Foundations of Spatial Data Science](https://jreades.github.io/fsds/){.stretched-link}
Core principles and applications of spatial data science as I understand them.
:::

::: {.resource-card}
### [<i class="bi bi-person-workspace"></i> GeoPython Workshop](https://geopython.github.io/geopython-workshop/){.stretched-link}
Practical workshop materials for geospatial analysis with Python.
:::

:::


## Time Series Analysis

::: {.software-grid}

::: {.resource-card}
[![](https://filippomb.github.io/python-time-series-handbook/_static/logo.png){.resource-img}](https://filippomb.github.io/python-time-series-handbook/notebooks/00/intro.html#){.stretched-link}
### [Time Series Analysis with Python](https://filippomb.github.io/python-time-series-handbook/notebooks/00/intro.html#)
A comprehensive handbook for time series analysis in the Python ecosystem.
:::

::: {.resource-card}
[![](https://otexts.com/fpp2/fpp2_cover.jpg){.resource-img}](https://otexts.com/fpp2/){.stretched-link}
### [Forecasting: Principles & Practice](https://otexts.com/fpp2/)
The fundamental textbook for forecasting principles using Python and R.
:::

::: {.resource-card}
### [<i class="bi bi-list-ul"></i> Overview of Time Series Packages](https://siebert-julien.github.io/time-series-analysis-python/){.stretched-link}
A curated list and overview of time series analysis packages in Python.
:::

::: {.resource-card}
### [<i class="bi bi-graph-up"></i> Statsmodels — Time Series](https://www.statsmodels.org/stable/index.html){.stretched-link}
Official documentation for statistical modeling and time series in Python.
:::

::: {.resource-card}
### [<i class="bi bi-google"></i> TensorFlow — Time Series](https://www.tensorflow.org/tutorials/structured_data/time_series){.stretched-link}
Guide to building time series forecasting models with TensorFlow.
:::

:::


## AHP & MCDM (Python)

::: {.software-grid}

::: {.resource-card}
### [<i class="bi bi-box-seam"></i> pyDecision — MCDM Tools](https://github.com/Valdecy/pyDecision){.stretched-link}
A Python library with 86+ Multi-Criteria Decision Making (MCDM) tools.
:::

::: {.resource-card}
### [<i class="bi bi-scales"></i> ahpy — Analytic Hierarchy Process](https://pypi.org/project/ahpy/){.stretched-link}
Python implementation of the Analytic Hierarchy Process (AHP).
:::

::: {.resource-card}
### [<i class="bi bi-github"></i> MCDM Implementations](https://github.com/AhmedAlaaElDeen/MCDM){.stretched-link}
A GitHub repository containing various MCDM algorithm implementations.
:::

::: {.resource-card}
### [<i class="bi bi-lightbulb"></i> Tutorial: MCDM in Python](https://towardsdatascience.com/multi-criteria-decision-analysis-in-python-aef7b3f3f9d1){.stretched-link}
A practical tutorial on performing multi-criteria decision analysis.
:::

:::


## Machine Learning

::: {.software-grid}

::: {.resource-card}
[![](https://www.tomasbeuzen.com/python-for-geospatial-analysis/_images/logo.png){.resource-img}](https://www.tomasbeuzen.com/python-for-geospatial-analysis/README.html){.stretched-link}
### [Python for Geospatial Analysis](https://www.tomasbeuzen.com/python-for-geospatial-analysis/README.html)
Integrating machine learning workflows into geospatial analysis.
:::

::: {.resource-card}
[![](https://opengeohub.github.io/spatial-prediction-eml/img/Fig_space_time_cube.png){.resource-img}](https://opengeohub.github.io/spatial-prediction-eml/index.html){.stretched-link}
### [Spatial Prediction using EML](https://opengeohub.github.io/spatial-prediction-eml/index.html)
Spatial and spatiotemporal interpolation using Ensemble Machine Learning.
:::

::: {.resource-card}
[![](https://geo-smart.github.io/mlgeo-book/_static/GeoSMART_logo.svg){.resource-img}](https://geo-smart.github.io/mlgeo-book/about_this_book/about_this_book.html){.stretched-link}
### [ML in the Geosciences](https://geo-smart.github.io/mlgeo-book/about_this_book/about_this_book.html)
Applications of machine learning in earth and geospatial sciences.
:::

::: {.resource-card}
[![](https://geostatsguy.github.io/MachineLearningDemos_Book/_static/AppliedMachineLearning.jpg){.resource-img}](https://geostatsguy.github.io/MachineLearningDemos_Book/intro.html){.stretched-link}
### [Applied ML in Python](https://geostatsguy.github.io/MachineLearningDemos_Book/intro.html)
A hands-on guide with code for applied machine learning.
:::

::: {.resource-card}
[![](https://hamedalemo.github.io/advanced-geo-python/_static/logo.png){.resource-img}](https://hamedalemo.github.io/advanced-geo-python/intro.html){.stretched-link}
### [Advanced Geospatial Analytics](https://hamedalemo.github.io/advanced-geo-python/intro.html)
Advanced techniques for geospatial data science and analytics.
:::

::: {.resource-card}
[![](https://opengeohub.github.io/spatial-sampling-ml/img/Fig_PCA_components_Ebergotzen.png){.resource-img}](https://opengeohub.github.io/spatial-sampling-ml/index.html){.stretched-link}
### [Spatial Sampling for ML](https://opengeohub.github.io/spatial-sampling-ml/index.html)
Techniques for effective spatial sampling in machine learning projects.
:::

:::


## Deep Learning

::: {.software-grid}

::: {.resource-card}
### [<i class="bi bi-rocket-takeoff"></i> fast.ai — Practical Deep Learning](https://www.fast.ai/){.stretched-link}
One of the best practical courses for applying Deep Learning to real problems.
:::

::: {.resource-card}
### [<i class="bi bi-google"></i> TensorFlow — Tutorials](https://www.tensorflow.org/learn){.stretched-link}
Official learning path for building and deploying models with TensorFlow.
:::

::: {.resource-card}
### [<i class="bi bi-fire"></i> PyTorch Tutorials](https://pytorch.org/tutorials/){.stretched-link}
Comprehensive tutorials for the PyTorch deep learning framework.
:::

::: {.resource-card}
### [<i class="bi bi-layers"></i> Keras — Guide](https://keras.io/){.stretched-link}
Documentation and tutorials for high-level deep learning with Keras.
:::

:::


## Learning Resources

::: {.software-grid}

::: {.resource-card}
### [<i class="bi bi-mortarboard"></i> Coursera](https://www.coursera.org/){.stretched-link}
Access to specialized geospatial and data science courses from top universities.
:::

::: {.resource-card}
### [<i class="bi bi-laptop"></i> Udemy](https://www.udemy.com/){.stretched-link}
Practical, hands-on courses for learning Python and GIS tools.
:::

::: {.resource-card}
### [<i class="bi bi-database"></i> Kaggle Learn](https://www.kaggle.com/learn){.stretched-link}
Free, practical micro-courses on data science and machine learning.
:::

::: {.resource-card}
### [<i class="bi bi-book"></i> Official Python Tutorial](https://docs.python.org/3/tutorial/){.stretched-link}
The authoritative guide I recommend for mastering the Python language.
:::

::: {.resource-card}
[![](https://placehold.co/100x60/cccccc/333333?text=Cover){.resource-img}](https://jovian.com/learn/data-analysis-with-python-zero-to-pandas){.stretched-link}
### [Zero to Pandas](https://jovian.com/learn/data-analysis-with-python-zero-to-pandas)
A practical introduction to data analysis with Python and Pandas.
:::

::: {.resource-card}
### [<i class="bi bi-flask"></i> Software Carpentry: Python](https://swcarpentry.github.io/python-novice-inflammation/){.stretched-link}
A foundational tutorial for geoscientists new to Python.
:::

:::


## GitHub Repositories

::: {.software-grid}

::: {.resource-card}
### [<i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> 30 Days of Python](https://github.com/Asabeneh/30-Days-Of-Python){.stretched-link}
A step-by-step challenge to learn Python in 30 days.
:::

::: {.resource-card}
### [<i class="bi bi-globe"></i> Geospatial Data Science](https://github.com/mszell/geospatialdatascience){.stretched-link}
A collection of notebooks for geospatial data science.
:::

::: {.resource-card}
### [<i class="bi bi-map"></i> GeoPandas Tutorial](https://github.com/jorisvandenbossche/geopandas-tutorial){.stretched-link}
Excellent tutorial repository for mastering GeoPandas.
:::

::: {.resource-card}
### [<i class="bi bi-code-square"></i> Applied Geospatial DS](https://github.com/PacktPublishing/Applied-Geospatial-Data-Science-with-Python){.stretched-link}
Code repository for applied geospatial data science workflows.
:::

::: {.resource-card}
### [<i class="bi bi-cloud"></i> Brown GeoData GEE](https://github.com/Brown-University-Library/geodata_earthengine){.stretched-link}
Earth Engine data processing scripts from Brown University.
:::

::: {.resource-card}
### [<i class="bi bi-robot"></i> GEE Python + ML](https://github.com/waleedgeo/gee_py_ml){.stretched-link}
Integrating GEE with Python and Machine Learning.
:::

:::


## Extra

::: {.software-grid}


::: {.resource-card}
### [Cloud-Based RS with GEE](https://www.eefabook.org/){.stretched-link}
The fundamental book for learning Google Earth Engine (EEFA Book).
:::

:::
